name: pulsecart
description: PulseCart capstone application handoff for GitHub Actions SRE and DevSecOps labs.

scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @pulsecart/domain test:unit && pnpm --filter @pulsecart/api test:unit && pnpm --filter @pulsecart/web test:unit
scripts.docker:build: docker build -f apps/api/Dockerfile -t pulsecart-api:local . && docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile -t pulsecart-web:local .
